texto: I took all my blessings for granted. The fact that God has given me another chance to do what I love to do, and still have my husband and my children and my sanity and good people in my corner, I'm gonna do it right this time and show that I appreciate it.
explicacao: Citação de Remy Ma sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “I took all my blessings for granted. The fact that God has given me another chance to do what I l…” articula familia, love, time em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como time e children.

frase_original: I took all my blessings for granted. The fact that God has given me another chance to do what I love to do, and still have my husband and my children and my sanity and good people in my corner, I'm gonna do it right this time and show that I appreciate it.

texto: We have all these politicians that claim they're pro-life and that say women should not be able to get abortions and all this other stuff... there's nothing more pro-life than helping a woman who wants to have a child have a child. Then I realized that health insurance doesn't cover IVF.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Remy Ma sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “We have all these politicians that claim they're pro-life and that say women should not be able t…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a familia, women, woman, útil em momentos de woman e child.

frase_original: We have all these politicians that claim they're pro-life and that say women should not be able to get abortions and all this other stuff... there's nothing more pro-life than helping a woman who wants to have a child have a child. Then I realized that health insurance doesn't cover IVF.
